flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St. Thomas Aquinas College rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.2k → $21.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St. Thomas Aquinas College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.3k → $39.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St. Thomas Aquinas College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).
